chunks.text: Our staff go above and beyond to support the students, enable the faculty, and keep the department running smoothly. Staff Contact Quick List: Support group email addresses. Organizational Chart: Who reports to whom: from Chairs to staff. Includes a link to the IRIS org chart.

Our Leadership: Industrial and Public Relations Staff: Corporate Access Program (CAP), student recruitment and information sessions; Berkeley EECS Affiliates (BEECSA) program, BEARS conference, Joint Colloquium, and special events; technical reports, research summaries, grad student resume directory and other publications.
Student Affairs Staff: Admissions; undergraduate and graduate programs; individual administrative assistance for all EE and CS students; reader/tutor assignments; Self-Paced Center.
Course Support Staff: EE and CS course materials/copying services, textbook adoption and instructional library; eGrade submission; class scheduling in Cory and Soda Halls.
Faculty Support Staff: Chair support; academic personnel (merits, promotions, leave, recruiting, faculty policies, benefits, etc.); faculty awards.

Human Resources Staff: Payroll and benefits. Computer and IT Support Staff: Instructional and administrative computing, EECS Help Desk, computer accounts and user support; information management, administrative database support, web and event calendar support.

Facilities and Engineering Services Staff: Cory and Soda Hall keys, card keys, copy cards, mail delivery, room reservations, and building management (maintenance, space planning, safety); phone lines; engineering and infrastructure development and support for Cory and Soda Hall instructional labs; online lecture capturing and AV support; parking arrangements.
Accounting & Financial Services Staff: Purchasing, reimbursements, fund balances, card management, recharge/billing.
